summary: Data and IT professional with MSc Information Technology (University of the West of Scotland, 2026) and hands-on experience in data analysis, cloud infrastructure, and automation. Skilled in SQL, Python, Power BI, and AWS. AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (2025).

experience.title: Data and Operations Specialist
bullets: Analysed operational and production data across departments, identifying trends and performance inefficiencies to support management decisions
Built Excel dashboards tracking KPIs across construction projects, reducing manual reporting time by 30%
Managed procurement data and supplier records, improving data accuracy and stock visibility
Coordinated cross-department data flow and produced weekly operational reports for senior leadership

experience.title: Cleaning Operative
bullets: Maintained operational standards across client sites while pursuing MSc and AWS certification full-time

projects.name: ENGMart – Cloud Retail and Inventory System
projects.description: MSc dissertation project. Three-tier cloud retail and inventory management platform deployed on AWS. React frontend served from S3/CloudFront, Node.js/Express backend on Elastic Beanstalk, MySQL 8.4 on RDS. Supports multi-role access (admin, staff), stock tracking, and sales reporting.
projects.tech: React · Node.js · MySQL · AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront, Elastic Beanstalk) · Three-tier architecture

projects.name: NHS Sponsorship Tracker
projects.description: Fully serverless AWS pipeline that scrapes NHS Jobs XML API every 6 hours via EventBridge and Lambda, filters for visa-sponsorship roles using two-stage keyword matching, deduplicates results in DynamoDB, stores data in S3, and sends email alerts via SES. Live CloudFront dashboard.
projects.tech: Python · AWS Lambda · EventBridge · DynamoDB · S3 · SES · CloudFront · IAM

projects.name: JobHunter Pro – Automated Job Application System
projects.description: 24/7 automated job hunting pipeline deployed on AWS EC2. Scans Reed.co.uk and Indeed every 20 minutes, scores jobs via keyword matching, tailors CVs per role using Claude API, generates PDF output, and sends email alerts. Live dashboard with filtering, settings, and re-tailor functionality.
projects.tech: Python · Claude API · Reed API · JSearch RapidAPI · ReportLab · AWS EC2 · Secrets Manager

projects.name: SponsorMap – UK Visa Sponsor Search Tool
projects.description: Tool for international candidates to find UK employers on the Home Office sponsor register. Combines Companies House API data with Home Office CSV exports, served via React frontend on GitHub Pages with serverless Lambda backend.
projects.tech: React · AWS Lambda · API Gateway · DynamoDB · Companies House API · GitHub Pages

education.school: University of the West of Scotland
education.notes: Dissertation: ENGMart – Cloud Retail and Inventory System. Supervisor: Zeeshan Ahmad.
